video_caption: The video begins with a close-up, upward view of a white ceiling featuring a long fluorescent light and structural beams, with a cylindrical column and window blinds visible at the bottom. From 0 to 2 seconds, the camera moves backward and slightly upward while panning left, gradually revealing more of the ceiling and the top of the window. Around 2 seconds, the camera tilts downward while continuing to move backward and right, revealing the full window with translucent blinds, a long metal-framed table in front of it, and a white cabinet along the right wall. In the final 3 seconds, the camera slides left, pans right, and tilts down sharply, bringing the table, cabinet, and dark floor into clearer view, ending with a slight forward and rightward slide while maintaining the downward tilt.
